# Paraglide JS

Paraglide JS is a compiler-first internationalization library for TanStack Start, SvelteKit, Vite, React Router, Next.js, Astro, and vanilla JavaScript or TypeScript apps.

## Documentation

- [Introduction](https://paraglidejs.com/)
- [Comparison](https://paraglidejs.com/comparison)
- [Quick Start](https://paraglidejs.com/basics)
- [SvelteKit](https://paraglidejs.com/sveltekit)
- [TanStack Router](https://paraglidejs.com/tanstack-router)
- [TanStack Start](https://paraglidejs.com/tanstack-start)
- [React Router](https://paraglidejs.com/react-router)
- [Next.js](https://paraglidejs.com/next-js)
- [Astro](https://paraglidejs.com/astro)
- [Vite](https://paraglidejs.com/vite)
- [Blog](https://paraglidejs.com/blog)

## Source

- [Repository](https://github.com/opral/paraglide-js)
- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@inlang/paraglide-js)
